_comment: Resolution-only tsconfig for dependency-cruiser. It maps @bridge/* to package SOURCES so the
Spec §1.2 layering rules are enforced on source imports, with or without a prior build.
It compiles nothing. It lives at the repo root on purpose: dependency-cruiser resolves this
config's paths against the CWD, so root placement removes any file-relative vs CWD-relative
ambiguity. Build tsconfigs must stay free of `paths`.
